raw_response:
{
  "current_life_events": "Today I experienced a sudden spike in pain and fatigue after a long day of freelance work, and the dizziness made me worry about the effectiveness of my current treatment plan. I also had a tense conversation with my spouse about feeling misunderstood and the need for more emotional support.",
  "mental_state": "I feel drained and anxious, constantly questioning whether the treatments will ever bring relief and fearing that my health will keep deteriorating.",

  "resistance_cooperation_level": "medium",

  "why_bringing_these_up_now": "The flare‑up and the strained conversation with my spouse made the health anxiety and relationship conflict feel immediate, prompting me to seek support today."
}
